name: Captrix platform format switching
description: Checks that platform buttons switch the visible format without needing a video upload.

planSteps.description: data-testid=platform-instagram-reels, data-testid=platform-youtube-shorts, data-testid=platform-youtube-video, and data-testid=platform-square-post are visible.
The page shows YouTube and 1920 x 1080.
The page shows Shorts and 1080 x 1920, and data-testid=video-stage remains visible.
